rationale: The only direct match evidence is a single DOI reference entry with no title or in-text context, so we cannot see how the citation is used. There is plausible conceptual overlap (both papers discuss consumer processing of brand cues and need for cognition), but the citing paper’s core contribution (brand schematicity scale development and moderation in brand extension) is distinct from alphanumeric-name choice effects. Given sparse evidence and no usage context, this cannot be safely dropped or clearly kept.
